tags.note: Westhills (one word) is not to be confused with the immediately adjacent West Hills (two words). Westhills is a recognized unincorporated section of Los Angeles County while West Hills is a neighborhood in the incorporated city of Los Angeles.

tags.name: Unincorporated Chatsworth
tags.note: Unincorporated Chatsworth is part of Los Angeles County, but it is separate from the neighborhood of Chatsworth in the city of Los Angeles.  Also known as Chatsworth or Santa Susana Mountains

tags.name: Unincorporated Santa Monica Mountains
tags.note: The state & county designate this as Unincorporated Santa Monica Mountains, though the blue street signs simply say Santa Monica Mountains.  The area is comprised of smaller neighborhoods like Cornell, Monte Nido, El Nido, Las Flores Canyon, and more.
